name: Bowhead Specialty Holdings Inc.
business: Bowhead Specialty Holdings Inc. offers commercial specialty property and casualty insurance products, focusing on casualty, professional liability, and healthcare liability risks. Products are delivered through two complementary underwriting models: a craft model for large, complex risks and a digital model (including Baleen Specialty and express offerings) for smaller, simpler risks. Policies are primarily written on a non-admitted (excess and surplus lines) basis and distributed through wholesale and retail brokers.
sellsTo: policyholders varying in size, industry and complexity
commercial entities in construction, distribution, manufacturing, real estate, public entity, hospitality, healthcare, financial institutions, and not-for-profit organizations
namedSuppliers: American Family Connect Property and Casualty Insurance Company

exposures.sentence: We offer commercial specialty property and casualty (P&C) insurance products to policyholders that vary in size, industry and complexity, focusing on casualty, professional liability, and healthcare liability risks.

We offer management liability products, including directors and officers liability, errors and omissions liability, employment practices liability, fiduciary liability, fidelity liability and miscellaneous professional liability, crime insurance, and cyber liability.

catalysts.event: Ceding fee on net premiums assumed from AmFam increases to 3.25%
catalysts.sentence: This ceding fee will increase to 3.25% on May 23, 2026 and 5.0% on May 23, 2027.

catalysts.event: Ceding fee on net premiums assumed from AmFam increases to 5.0%
catalysts.sentence: This ceding fee will increase to 3.25% on May 23, 2026 and 5.0% on May 23, 2027.
The Senior Notes are scheduled to mature on December 1, 2030, unless redeemed earlier.
The 2025 Facility matures on the earlier of November 26, 2027, or 91 days prior to the earliest date any MGA Agreement will terminate where no MGA Agreement replacement is found.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. commercial E&S market size of $95.1 billion for year ended December 31, 2024, growing 19.5% annually since 2019
tamClaims.sentence: We primarily operate in the $95.1 billion U.S. commercial E&S market (for the year ended December 31, 2024) that has grown 19.5% annually since 2019.
